subcodes.first_line: Blessed be He Who hath made this day a festival for all time, when even in the watches of night the sun was conjoined with the celestial sphere; when the sun of wondrous newness rose in balanced measure at the dawning of days, and in its night two heavenly orbs, the sun from among the seven, did meet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. تبارک الذی جعل الیوم یوم العید لم یزل و ان فی شطر من اللیل تقترن الشمس بالجلم تلعت شمس البدیعة فی اوا الایام معتدل و فی لیله التقی الفلکان شمس من السبع
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy
